texts: Gibbons, Margaret, Guide to St. Patrick’s Purgatory, Lough Derg, pp. 24-30

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts: AD 1917 - Leslie litigation renewed and finally settled by agreement (Sir John Leslie with drew claim to ownership of the Island, which was then legally vested in the ecclesiastical authorities. Ferry rights and other concessions on the mainland and in the lake were made to them for a consideration)
